name: Research Core
description: SciAILab project registry and Python runtime bridge.

pythonBinary.description: Python executable used for the SciAILab runtime worker.

serviceBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the SciAILab FastAPI service.

dbPath.description: Optional path to research.db. Relative paths resolve from the SciAILab repo root.

workspaceRoot.description: Optional path to the workspace/projects root. Relative paths resolve from the SciAILab repo root.

coordinatorExecution.description: Coordinator execution backend. agent uses OpenClaw subagents and bundled skills; python keeps the deterministic FastAPI fallback.

coordinatorAutoRun.description: Whether research-core should poll the task queue and run coordinators automatically.

coordinatorPollMs.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for the coordinator service.

coordinatorBatchSize.description: Maximum claimed tasks per polling pass.

coordinatorRunTimeoutMs.description: Subagent run timeout in milliseconds for one coordinator task.

coordinatorSessionPrefix.description: Session key prefix for plugin-owned coordinator subagent runs.

coordinatorDeleteSession.description: Delete coordinator subagent sessions after completion.

coordinatorProvider.description: Optional provider override for plugin-owned coordinator subagent runs.

coordinatorModel.description: Optional model override for plugin-owned coordinator subagent runs.
